desc: 2 bed, 2.5 bath townhouse with 1-car garage and loft/office. Wood burning fireplace, new 2017 gas furnace, new hot water heater. Excellent access to transportation, beach, and shopping.
description:
2-bedroom, 2.5-bath townhouse with a 1-car garage and flexible loft space — perfect for a home office, studio, or playroom. The living room features a wood-burning fireplace for cozy evenings at home.

Major mechanicals have been replaced: new gas furnace (2017) and new hot water heater. Excellent location with easy access to shore transportation, Jersey Shore beaches, and Monmouth Mall.
